## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the GrowthX client list for Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) research, focusing on selecting appropriate customers and planning outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ideal candidates: 3+ months tenure, diverse industries, engaged/happy, seeing value](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [10 promising clients identified: Galileo, Webflow, AirBite, Zuplow, Ramp, RunPod, Fathom, Adventures Group, + 2 others](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Outreach strategy: Directors to facilitate introductions, $100 gift card incentive](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Next steps: Get Marcel's approval, finalize participant list, craft outreach message](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Client Selection Criteria

  - [3+ months tenure (past initial churn risk)](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Diverse sample set across industries](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Engaged and satisfied with GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Seeing tangible value and growth impact](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Potential for rich, insightful feedback](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Notable Client Profiles

  - [Galileo: Working since Sept, considering upsell. Main contact: Connor (Head of Developer Awareness)](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Webflow: Long-term client (since Aug 2022), unique agency profile](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [AirBite: Started mid-March, good early signals, technical CEO (Sean) who understands GrowthX value](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Zuplow: Kicked off late Jan, technical POC (Adrian), positive growth indicators](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Adventures Group: B2C travel company, unique multilingual content needs, strong growth](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

### Research Goals and Applications

  - [Validate intuitive knowledge with customer voices](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Inform positioning, messaging, and value props (for Jason in Go-to-Market)](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Create tailored sales approaches and talk tracks](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Identify job clusters for granular business line applications](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Outreach Strategy

  - [Directors to facilitate introductions via DM](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [$100 gift card incentive (non-service compensation)](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [George to draft message template for directors](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Daniel to join calls; directors optional based on value-add](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Get Marcel's approval and input on final client list](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Create outreach message template for directors](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Coordinate with directors to send personalized invitations](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Schedule interviews with selected clients](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Prepare interview guide and logistics for JTBD research](https://fathom.video/share/E_rirPY7YTS5CsTnAGyRz2gqL93PwKzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
